name: Destination Vulnerable to Detected Exploit on a Different Port
notes: Reports an attack against a vulnerable local destination host, where the host is known to exist, and the host is vulnerable to the attack on a different port.
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Exploit, Potential Exploit
when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
when the destination is vulnerable to current exploit on any port
when an event matches any of the following Destination Vulnerable to Detected Exploit
TD_list: APPLY Destination Vulnerable to Detected Exploit on a Different Port on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Exploit, Potential Exploit
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
AND when the destination is vulnerable to current exploit on any port
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following Destination Vulnerable to Detected Exploit
RED_list: Event name: Destination Vulnerable to Detected Exploit on a Different Port
Event description: Detected an attack against a vulnerable local destination, where the destination is known to exist, and the host is vulnerable to the attack on a different port.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
Add "qidNumber" to Reference Map Of Sets: "CorrelatedAttackMap" with key "destinationIP"
